flashcards.definition: A quadrilateral with exactly one pair of parallel sides (bases).
A trapezoid with congruent legs; base angles are congruent, diagonals are congruent.
Connects the midpoints of the legs; parallel to bases and length = (b₁ + b₂)/2.
A quadrilateral with two pairs of consecutive congruent sides (no pair of opposite sides ≅).
Perpendicular; one diagonal bisects the other.
